{{distinguish|Kohanim}}
The Aaronic Priesthood is a priestly lineage in [[Mormonism]]

It is generally considered a predecessor to the [[Omega Priesthood]], and a successor to the [[Kohanim]]

It was given to [[Joseph Smith]] and [[Oliver Cowdery]] simultaneously by [[John the Baptist]], and as such theoretically has two separate lineages. However Aaronic Priesthood initiations were not tracked in the LDS church as [[Melchizedek Priesthood]] ones are, so this does not seem likely as a practical concept

It has several offices
{| border="1" cellpadding="5" cellspacing="0"
|- 
!Office
!Minimum requirement to be ordained to office
!Rights and responsibilities
!Name of quorum organization
!Maximum number in quorum
|-
|'''[[W:Bishop (Latter Day Saints)|Bishop]]'''<ref>{{harvnb|Pearson|1992|pp=117–118}}</ref>
|Male over the age of 18; literal descendant of Aaron or a [[High priest (Latter Day Saints)|high priest]] of the Melchizedek Priesthood<ref>[https://www.churchofjesuschrist.org/study/scriptures/dc-testament/dc/107.17?lang=eng Doctrine & Covenants 107:17]</ref>
|''See [[W:Bishop (Latter Day Saints)|Bishop (Latter Day Saints)]]''
|No quorum of bishops; bishop is president of the priests quorum
|No quorum of bishops; bishop is president of the priests quorum
|-
|'''[[W:Priest (Latter Day Saints)|Priest]]'''<ref>{{harvnb|Hollist|1992|pp=1132–1133}}</ref>
|Male in the January of his 16th year{{efn-lr|When a Latter-day Saint male is 18 or older, he is encouraged to become an [[Elder (Latter Day Saints)|elder]] of the church, which is an office of the [[Melchizedek priesthood (Latter Day Saints)|Melchizedek priesthood]] yet still holds the authority of the Aaronic priesthood. However, before receiving the Melchizedek priesthood, an adult male must first receive the Aaronic priesthood; thus, men who convert to the Church as adults are usually ordained priests in the Aaronic priesthood shortly after their baptism and confirmation.}}
|
*Perform [[Baptism|baptisms]] and give others the Aaronic priesthood (to the office of deacon, teacher, and priest)
*Bless the [[W:Sacrament (Latter Day Saints)|sacrament]]
*All rights of a teacher
|Priests quorum
|48
|-
|'''[[Teacher (Latter Day Saints)|Teacher]]'''<ref>{{harvnb|Christianson|1992|p=1441}}</ref>
|Male in the January of his 14th year
|
*[[W:Ministering|Ministering]]
*Prepare the [[W:Sacrament (Latter Day Saints)|sacrament]]
*All rights of a deacon
|Teachers quorum
|24
|-
|'''[[W:Deacon (Latter Day Saints)|Deacon]]'''<ref>{{harvnb|Bramble|1992|p=361}}</ref>
|Male in the January of his 12th year
|
*Ministering of [[angels]]
*Pass the [[W:Sacrament (Latter Day Saints)|sacrament]] and collect [[W:Fast offering|fast offerings]]
*Bishop may assign other duties
|Deacons quorum
|12
|}
==References==
<references />
===Footnotes===
{{notelist}}
{{Priestly Lineages}}

[[Category:Omega Priesthood]]
[[Category:Pages that existed before the Great November Outage]]
[[sn:Aaronic Priesthood]][[sn:Aaronic Priesthood]][[Category:Priesthood offices of the Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints]]
[[sn:Aaronic Priesthood]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
